name: get_active_schedule_timetable
description: Retrieves the currently active heating schedule timetable for a specific zone, indicating which schedule is active and its configuration details. Returns the ID and type of the active schedule (e.g., SEVEN_DAY, THREE_DAY) to show which preset schedule is currently in effect for the zone.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone/room
